title: Nasturtium hayanicum

The species Nasturtium hayanicum is a type of annual or perennial flowering plant. Nasturtium hayanicum is native to the island of Haiti, which is part of the Greater Antilles. It is classified as a rare species due to its limited geographical distribution.
